data_gaps: T-75 official lineups are still required before final tail activation.
Goalkeeper and center-back late fitness or rotation changes are not fully locked for all M73-M84 teams.
This packet does not modify formal prediction files; it is a tactical handoff for model-layer implementation.

knockout_big_score_tail_layer.purpose: Add explicit tactical tail paths when knockout match dynamics can move beyond central Poisson score slices.
activation_logic: favorite_runaway_path: activate when favorite transition_attack or wide_channel is at least +0.30 and opponent transition_defense_risk or defensive_line_risk is at most -0.30.
open_two_way_path: activate when both teams have transition_attack at least +0.30 and both have transition_defense_risk or defensive_line_risk at most -0.25.
late_chase_collapse_path: activate when the trailing-side game_state_tendency is at least +0.20 and its line or transition defense risk is at most -0.25.
set_piece_break_path: activate when one team has set_piece_advantage at least +0.20 and the opponent has aerial, goalkeeper, or center-back uncertainty.
do_not_amplify_gate: suppress when a low block, draw management, or central-control parity is the stronger tactical read and neither side has a clear transition or width mismatch.
double_counting_policy: Do not add the same signal again if player_state already rewards a star forward or winger's form.
Do not double count set pieces if the base model has already raised set-piece xG or aerial mismatch.
Correlate transition_defense_risk and defensive_line_risk before adding tail mass; they are usually the same failure channel.
The layer should redistribute scoreline tail mass, not inflate overall team quality without a tactical trigger.

evidence: M74 Germany pressing_adjustment +0.40 and central_control_advantage +0.55 against Paraguay central_control_advantage -0.45.
M84 Spain build_up_resistance_adjustment +0.40 and pressing_adjustment +0.25 against Austria high press with transition_defense_risk -0.35.
M81 United States pressing_adjustment +0.25 against Bosnia build_up_resistance_adjustment -0.25.
global_triggers.model_note: When a strong favorite can both press and pass through the opponent press, shift part of central 1-goal margin mass into favorite_runaway_path. Cap if the favorite's player_state already carries the same stars.

evidence: M76 Brazil wide_channel_advantage +0.45 versus Japan wide_channel_advantage -0.35 and set_piece_advantage -0.30.
M77 France wide_channel_advantage +0.35 versus Sweden wide_channel_advantage -0.30 and defensive_line_risk -0.35.
M84 Spain wide_channel_advantage +0.35 versus Austria wide_channel_advantage -0.30 and defensive_line_risk -0.35.
global_triggers.model_note: Use as a tail multiplier only when paired with opponent line risk or late chase behavior; do not treat every winger edge as a runaway trigger.

evidence: M78 Ivory Coast transition_attack_adjustment +0.35 and Norway +0.40 while Norway transition_defense_risk and defensive_line_risk are both -0.35.
M82 Belgium transition_attack_adjustment +0.40 and Senegal +0.35 with both sides carrying transition defense risk.
M75 Netherlands transition_attack_adjustment +0.35 and Morocco +0.40, with current Markdown noting Netherlands multi-goal tail and Morocco 4-2 Haiti openness.
global_triggers.model_note: This should expand 3-2, 2-3 and 2-2 families more than one-sided 3-0 paths. Keep separate from raw attack_score.

evidence: M74 Paraguay set_piece_advantage +0.30 keeps an underdog scoring branch live even when Germany controls territory.
M80 England set_piece_advantage +0.30 and DR Congo +0.25 create asymmetric but nonzero dead-ball tail risk.
M83 Croatia set_piece_advantage +0.25 is the main reason not to flatten Croatia's late equalizer or extra-goal branch.
global_triggers.model_note: Use as a branch activator, not a broad attack upgrade. Avoid double counting if set-piece xG has already been raised.

evidence: M80 DR Congo build_up_resistance_adjustment -0.30 and central_control_advantage -0.45 against England central_control_advantage +0.45.
M81 Bosnia build_up_resistance_adjustment -0.25, transition_defense_risk -0.35 and defensive_line_risk -0.35 against United States width and pressure.
M74 Paraguay transition_defense_risk -0.35 and central_control_advantage -0.45 against Germany high press.
global_triggers.model_note: Only activate after T-75 confirms the vulnerable goalkeeper/center-back and build-up unit. This is a tactical error-chain flag, not a claim of individual mistakes.

evidence: M77 Sweden transition_attack_adjustment +0.35 but defensive_line_risk -0.35 creates a late chase split: one goal back or more space for France.
M82 Senegal game_state_tendency +0.25 and Belgium transition_defense_risk -0.30 create late two-way volatility.
M84 Austria pressing_adjustment +0.25 but defensive_line_risk -0.35 makes a trailing high-press chase vulnerable to Spain's width.
global_triggers.model_note: Apply after 60-minute game-state branch. It should alter tail families, not pre-match central xG by itself.

evidence: M77 France coach_substitution_risk +0.20 and game_state_tendency +0.25 with Dembele/Thuram/Cherki-type bench routes.
M80 England coach_substitution_risk +0.20 with Rogers, Madueke and Watkins style route changes.
M75 Morocco coach_substitution_risk +0.20 and Netherlands +0.15 support late open-tail paths.
global_triggers.model_note: Use only when bench profiles change speed, box occupation or width. Cap heavily if squad-depth is already in team_strength_score.

match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: South Africa low-block/game-state floor and Canada uncertainty around fullback/midfield minutes point more to controlled variance than runaway.
tactical_triggers: South Africa low block and set_piece +0.25
match_audit.model_note: Do not force favorite_runaway. Keep a modest late 2-2/3-2 style branch only if Canada chase or wingbacks overextend.

match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Do not erase Paraguay set-piece and low-block survival, but the mismatch is strong enough to surface runaway paths.
match_audit.model_note: Current predictions already show 3-0 in top five, but the tail layer should explicitly preserve 3-1/4-1 instead of letting central 1-goal margins dominate.

match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Not a pure favorite runaway because Morocco transition and bench routes remain live.
tactical_triggers: Morocco third-round 4-2 openness noted in Markdown
match_audit.model_note: Move some central draw and 2-1 mass into open two-way tail. Keep both-team scoring branch distinct from Netherlands quality.

match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Japan transition and draw-management quality prevent a single one-sided tail only.
match_audit.model_note: Explicitly surface favorite_runaway while retaining Japan counter branch; avoid double counting Vinicius or Brazil attack_score.

match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Sweden set pieces and dual-forward transition keep a concession branch live, but defensive-line mismatch is severe.
match_audit.model_note: Formal Markdown already lists volatile tail, but model layer should label this as favorite_runaway instead of treating 3-1 as just a neighbor score.

match_audit.fixture: 科特迪瓦 vs 挪威
match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Neither side has enough central-control dominance for one-sided runaway; both have transition and line-risk exposure.
match_audit.model_note: The layer should create chaos-tail mass rather than a strong favorite blowout path.

match_audit.fixture: 墨西哥 vs 厄瓜多尔
match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Central control is near balanced, set-piece edges are small, and both teams have transition risk but not a clear collapse channel.
match_audit.model_note: Suppress big-score expansion unless T-75 lineups create a fullback mismatch or late chase branch.

match_audit.fixture: 英格兰 vs 刚果金
match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: DR Congo transition and set pieces keep a scoring branch live, but central-control and build-up mismatch points to runaway risk.
match_audit.model_note: Current 3-0 appears in top five; keep 3-1/4-1 as an explicit favorite_runaway family and cap against Bellingham/Kane double count.

path_families_to_surface: 4-1 only if early press goal or Bosnia chase
match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Bosnia set-piece and Dzeko/Pjanic-style outlet reduce the certainty of a clean runaway.
match_audit.model_note: Data collector now supplies probable XIs; activate only if USA keeps Adams/McKennie/Reyna width-control spine.

match_audit.fixture: 比利时 vs 塞内加尔
match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Belgium edge is not stable enough for pure runaway because Senegal transition and physical pressure remain strong.
match_audit.model_note: The model should not let 1-1 dominate the display without an open-tail family. This is a two-way volatility branch.

match_audit.fixture: 葡萄牙 vs 克罗地亚
path_families_to_surface: 2-2/3-2 only if Croatia set pieces land
match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Croatia's game-state control and veteran tempo management suppress broad big-score inflation.
match_audit.model_note: Add only a narrow tail branch; do not convert this into a broad runaway layer unless Croatia midfield legs are absent at T-75.

match_audit.fixture: 西班牙 vs 奥地利
path_families_to_surface: 3-2/2-2 secondary if Austria press creates early exchange
match_audit.do_not_amplify_reason: Austria set pieces and high press keep a scoring branch, but high-line exposure against Spain width is the dominant tail trigger.
match_audit.model_note: Current display includes 3-1 but should explicitly flag favorite_runaway because Austria's own press can create collapse risk if bypassed.

model_handoff.recommended_cap: Use small redistribution from central exact-score slices into tail families; do not change 1X2 or totals directly without modeler calibration.
red_team_challenge_points: Check whether recent group-stage big wins are already counted in attack/player_state.
Check whether T-75 lineups remove the winger, creator, goalkeeper, or center-back trigger.
Challenge M81 and M83 tail activation because evidence is medium rather than high.
Challenge M79 suppression only if official lineups create a new fullback mismatch.
